name: conductor-agents
description: Multi-agent orchestrator with eval-gated quality gates. Spawn parallel agent workers per track, verify output before merging.

scripts.release:patch: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm version patch && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm version minor && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm version major && git push origin main --follow-tags

simple-git-hooks.pre-commit: npm run lint && npm run typecheck

author: Jorge Jacome
